name: wbactc
message: The Wilkes Barre Area Career and Technical Center does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, national origin, sex, disability or age in its program or activities and provides equal access to all Groups.  For information on services, activities and/or accessibility, contact: Dr. Anthony Guariglia, Title IX Coordinator, at (570)822-4131, Wilkes Barre Area Career and Technical Center, 350 Jumper Road, Wilkes-Barre, Pa. 18705-0699.
